# site-archive — Legacy Byron design system build

**Status:** Archived 2026-06-17  
**Replaced by:** `site/public/` (Stokke-inspired site2 build, promoted to production)

This folder preserves the pre-redesign site that used `design-system.css` (brick/sage Byron tokens + Cursor hybrid shell). Kept for reference only — not deployed.

**Do not edit** unless recovering a specific pattern or asset from the old build.
